subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-11-24
subcodes.first_line: There was a certain Mustafa Effendi in charge of the newspaper, who persistently caused us difficulties and incited people against us, including the Mutasarrif Kurdih
subcodes.first_line_orig: مصطفی افندی نامی بود مدیر تحریرات لاینقطع اذیت میکرد ومردم را بر علیه ما میشوراند بطوری متصرف " کرده "
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @bribery and corruption, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
